variants: Yevgeniy Tsaplin is a gifted innovator who created the Feather Circuit Array, a device that has garnered considerable attention in the tech community. He was born in Leafdrop Corner and now makes his home in Dawnchime Row. His dedication and achievements in the field were recognized with the prestigious Mirage Branch Medallion. Yevgeniy is also an enthusiastic member of the Basilisk Mask Crafters, where he explores his interest in artistry through mask-making. His contributions span both technology and craft, enriching his local community and expanding his creative pursuits.
